target.title: fix(models): prefer exact configured provider refs before aliases
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #88218.

resolveConfiguredModelRef could reverse-match an exact configured provider/model primary against an alias value before it parsed the primary itself. If the alias key was bare, a fully qualified custom provider ref like nemotron-bolt/nemotron-3-super-120b could collapse to openai/nemotron.

This changes the precedence for exact configured custom provider refs:

- exact configured provider refs win before alias-value reverse matching
- existing slash-form alias behavior is preserved when there is no exact configured custom provider owner
- trailing auth-profile suffix handling still uses the model portion for the exact-ref check

## Validation

- COREPACK_HOME=/tmp/corepack node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts src/agents/model-selection.test.ts -t "keeps exact configured provider refs" --reporter=verbose
- COREPACK_HOME=/tmp/corepack node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts src/agents/model-selection.test.ts --reporter=verbose
- COREPACK_HOME=/tmp/corepack pnpm -s check:test-types
- git diff --check
